scalardb_properties:
scalar.db.storage=multi-storage
scalar.db.transaction_manager=consensus-commit
scalar.db.consensus_commit.isolation_level=READ_COMMITTED
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages=dynamo,mysql,postgres

# dynamo
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.dynamo.storage=dynamo
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.dynamo.contact_points=${SCALAR_RE_DB_DYNAMO_REGION:fakeRegion}
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.dynamo.username=${SCALAR_RE_DB_DYNAMO_ACCESS_KEY:fakeAccessKey}
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.dynamo.password=${SCALAR_RE_DB_DYNAMO_SECRET_KEY:fakeSecretKey}
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.dynamo.cross_partition_scan.enabled=true
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.dynamo.dynamo.endpoint_override=${SCALAR_RE_DB_DYNAMO_ENDPOINT:http://dynamodb:8000}
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.dynamo.dynamo.namespace.prefix=scalardb_

# mysql
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.mysql.storage=jdbc
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.mysql.contact_points=jdbc:mysql://${SCALAR_RE_DB_MYSQL_HOST:localhost}:3306/?sslMode=REQUIRED
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.mysql.username=${SCALAR_RE_DB_MYSQL_USERNAME:scalaradmin}
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.mysql.password=${SCALAR_RE_DB_MYSQL_PASSWORD:scalaradmin}
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.mysql.cross_partition_scan.enabled=true
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.mysql.cross_partition_scan.filtering.enabled=true
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.mysql.cross_partition_scan.ordering.enabled=true
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.mysql.jdbc.connection_pool.max_total=200
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.mysql.metadata.cache_expiration_time_secs=60

# postgres
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.postgres.storage=jdbc
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.postgres.contact_points=jdbc:postgresql://${SCALAR_RE_DB_POSTGRES_HOST:localhost}:5432/${SCALAR_RE_DB_POSTGRES_DATABASE:db_postgres}
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.postgres.username=${SCALAR_RE_DB_POSTGRES_USERNAME:scalaradmin}
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.postgres.password=${SCALAR_RE_DB_POSTGRES_PASSWORD:scalaradmin}
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.postgres.cross_partition_scan.enabled=true
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.postgres.cross_partition_scan.filtering.enabled=true
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.postgres.cross_partition_scan.ordering.enabled=true
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.postgres.jdbc.connection_pool.max_total=200
scalar.db.multi_storage.storages.postgres.metadata.cache_expiration_time_secs=60

# Namespace Mapping
scalar.db.multi_storage.namespace_mapping=coordinator:mysql,ns_dynamo:dynamo,ns_mysql:mysql,ns_postgres:postgres,scalarre:mysql
scalar.db.multi_storage.default_storage=mysql
